Container.Name: OPNsense-Exporter
Container.Overview: OPNsense Exporter - Prometheus exporter for OPNsense firewalls. Collects and exposes metrics from OPNsense via its REST API, including ARP tables, DNS (Unbound), WireGuard, OpenVPN, IPsec, firewall statistics, and firmware information.
Container.Description:
OPNsense Exporter is a Prometheus exporter that collects metrics from OPNsense firewalls remotely via their REST API. No local installation on the firewall is required.
FEATURES: - ARP table metrics - DNS / Unbound statistics (enable Extended Statistics in OPNsense for full data) - VPN: WireGuard, OpenVPN, IPsec - Firewall statistics - Firmware information - Cron task metrics - Grafana dashboard available at grafana.com/dashboards/21113
SETUP: 1. In OPNsense, create a dedicated API user: System > Access > Users > Add user Assign the "Readonly API" privilege (or a custom role with read access). 2. Generate an API key + secret for that user. 3. Enter the OPNsense address, protocol, API key, and API secret below. 4. Optionally disable subsystems you do not use to reduce API load.
For full Unbound DNS metrics: Services > Unbound DNS > Advanced > Enable Extended Statistics
PROMETHEUS SCRAPE CONFIG: - job_name: opnsense static_configs: - targets: ['[IP]:8080']

Config.Name: Metrics Port
Config.Description: Port on which the /metrics endpoint is exposed for Prometheus scraping.

Config.Name: OPNsense Protocol
Config.Description: Protocol used to reach the OPNsense API. Use 'https' (recommended) or 'http'.

Config.Name: OPNsense Address
Config.Description: Hostname or IP address of the OPNsense firewall (e.g. 192.168.1.1 or opnsense.lan). Do NOT include the protocol prefix.

Config.Name: OPNsense API Key
Config.Description: API key generated for the read-only OPNsense user (System > Access > Users).

Config.Name: OPNsense API Secret
Config.Description: API secret generated for the read-only OPNsense user (System > Access > Users).

Config.Name: Skip TLS Verification
Config.Description: Set to 'true' to disable TLS certificate verification (useful for self-signed certs). Not recommended in production.

Config.Name: Instance Label
Config.Description: Label added to all metrics to identify this OPNsense instance. Useful when scraping multiple firewalls.

Config.Name: Log Level
Config.Description: Log verbosity. Options: debug, info, warn, error.

Config.Name: Disable ARP Table
Config.Description: Set to 'true' to disable ARP table metric collection.

Config.Name: Disable Unbound DNS
Config.Description: Set to 'true' to disable Unbound DNS metric collection.

Config.Name: Disable WireGuard
Config.Description: Set to 'true' to disable WireGuard VPN metric collection.

Config.Name: Disable OpenVPN
Config.Description: Set to 'true' to disable OpenVPN metric collection.

Config.Name: Disable IPsec
Config.Description: Set to 'true' to disable IPsec VPN metric collection.

Config.Name: Disable Firewall
Config.Description: Set to 'true' to disable firewall statistics metric collection.

Config.Name: Disable Firmware
Config.Description: Set to 'true' to disable firmware information metric collection.

Config.Name: Disable Cron Table
Config.Description: Set to 'true' to disable cron task metric collection.

Config.Name: Disable Exporter Metrics
Config.Description: Set to 'true' to exclude internal Go/process metrics from the /metrics output.
